title: cereus multangularis var. limensis
intro: Cereus multangularis var. limensis, also known as the coastal pitaya or dragon fruit cactus, is a variety of cactus native to Peru. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Cereus multangularis var. limensis include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and providing antioxidant protection. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are typically used to support overall health and well-being.
